mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item(seller_id, title, description, price, category, condition_level, images, status) VALUES(#{sellerId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{category}, #{conditionLevel}, #{images}, #{status})

where.if: AND (i.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM item WHERE status = 0
